criteria.name: keyboard_operable_storyboard_controls
criteria.description: Every interactive control — header tools, Tile/List/Slide toggles, scene actions, Add Scene create form, and slide previous/next — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter/Space), each showing a visible focus indicator when focused.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: create_form_focus_management
criteria.description: When the Add Scene create form opens as a dialog or overlay, focus moves into the form; closing it returns focus to a sensible origin control such as Add Scene.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: scene_thumbnails_have_alt_text
criteria.description: Every scene thumbnail image carries descriptive alternative text.
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: create_validation_announced_live
criteria.description: Create-form validation messages are announced via an aria-live polite region as well as shown inline under the field.
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: create_fields_explicitly_labeled
criteria.description: The Add Scene title and description fields use explicit label elements associated with those controls.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Workspace headings (for example the storyboard title 1. Getting Started and section labels) follow a logical order with no skipped levels.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: workspace_landmarks_present
criteria.description: The app exposes semantic landmarks (for example header/nav for chrome and main for the scene board) so assistive technology can navigate the tool.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Header titles, scene description text, view toggles, and primary buttons meet sufficient contrast against their surfaces on the light workspace.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: active_view_toggle_exposed_to_at
criteria.description: The active Tile, List, or Slide toggle exposes its pressed state to assistive technology (for example aria-pressed or an equivalent selected state), not only a visual highlight.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, scene entrance staggers and Tile/List/Slide layout animations are removed and state changes apply instantly while every feature — create, edit, delete, and slide navigation — stays usable.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: undo_redo_export_import_keyboard
criteria.description: Undo, Redo, Export, Import, multi-select checkboxes, and bulk Delete selected are reachable and operable with the keyboard alone with a visible focus indicator
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: import_validation_announced_live
criteria.description: Import field-contract validation errors are announced via an aria-live polite region as well as shown inline
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: search_chips_presenter_keyboard
criteria.description: The search field carries a programmatically associated label, each shot-type filter chip exposes its selected state to assistive technology, and the Present control plus all presenter controls (Pause/Resume, previous/next, End presentation) are keyboard reachable and operable with visible focus indicators
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: presenter_escape_and_announcements
criteria.description: In the presenter, pressing Escape always exits back to the board, and scene changes (manual or auto-advance) are announced through an aria-live polite region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: in_memory_multi_facet_reload_reset
criteria.description: Starting on Tile: create a uniquely titled scene with a distinctive duration, switch to List then Slide and advance one step, edit a seeded scene body, then reload. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline together — seeded scenes (including Welcome to Docs! on scene 1), Tile mode active, first slide position, empty undo/redo, and seeded Total duration — never a mix of persisted user scenes with reset modes.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: slide_order_forward_then_back
criteria.description: Order proof: in Slide mode note the scene sequence while pressing Right through at least three scenes, then press Left the same number of times; the centered scenes walk back in reverse order with the N / total counter tracking, proving order is derived from the live collection rather than hardcoded snapshots.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: slide_counter_responds_to_navigation
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: in Slide mode, advancing previous/next changes the centered scene and the N / total counter meaningfully; staying put leaves them unchanged rather than redrawing identically regardless of navigation input.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: description_edit_echoes_across_modes
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: edit a scene description in Tile mode, then switch to List and Slide without reload — that same numbered scene shows the updated text in every mode.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: scene_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: note the visible scene count, submit one valid Add Scene, and confirm the count increases by exactly one; after deleting that scene, confirm the count decreases by exactly one and the Slide total tracks with no off-by-one lag.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: different_scenes_create_different_cards
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: create two scenes with clearly different titles and descriptions; the two new cards differ in the ways those inputs dictate and both appear on the board.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: interleaved_create_and_mode_switch
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: open Add Scene and fill title, switch to List mode, return and complete description submit; then edit another scene — neither flow corrupts the other, and both resulting texts remain coherent without reload.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: empty_board_then_repopulate
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: delete every scene (empty-board state visible), then create a new valid scene; the board count tracks through both transitions (zero then one) and the new card appears with the entered title/description.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: export_pipeline_contains_session_work
criteria.description: Full export pipeline: create a scene with a distinctive title and duration, edit another scene's shotType, switch to List; open Export and confirm Storyboard JSON shows schemaVersion storyboard-tutorial-v1 plus those values under field-contract keys with matching totalDuration, and the Markdown shot list names the same title, shot type, and duration; Copy shows a confirmation.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: storyboard_import_round_trip_reconstructs
criteria.description: After exporting Storyboard JSON from a mutated session, change the board further, then Import that JSON — scenes, view mode, and Total duration reconstruct to match the export, and both export previews match the restored state.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: total_duration_derived_sensitivity
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: note Total duration, create a scene with duration 12, confirm Total duration increases by exactly 12; edit that duration to 20 and confirm Total duration increases by 8 more; delete it and confirm Total duration returns to the prior baseline.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: undo_round_trip_after_create
criteria.description: Undo round-trip: create a uniquely titled scene (count +1), Undo (count back, title gone, Total duration restored), Redo (title and duration return).
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: filter_probe_search_and_chip
criteria.description: Create a scene with a unique title and the POV shot type. Type a unique substring of that title into search: only that scene remains visible in Tile and List and the filtered count reads 1 of M. Clear search and select the POV chip: only POV scenes (including the new one) remain. Select All and clear search: the full set returns exactly — proving the filters derive from the live collection.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: duplicate_count_and_duration_delta
criteria.description: Note the scene count and Total duration, select two scenes with known durations, and activate Duplicate selected: immediately the count increases by exactly two, the copies appear at the end with (copy) titles, and Total duration increases by exactly the sum of the two durations. Undo removes both copies and restores the prior count and Total duration together.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: presenter_timing_input_dependent
criteria.description: Arrange two scenes with clearly different durations (for example 3 and 8 seconds, creating or editing as needed). Start Present: the first scene auto-advances after roughly its duration while the second holds visibly longer, and the Scene N of total readout increments on each advance. Edit a scene's duration and re-present: its countdown length changes accordingly — timing derives from live data.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: outline_full_pipeline_probe
criteria.description: Create a scene with a distinctive title and duration, then move another scene earlier. Open Export and select Printable outline: the outline lists the session's scenes in the current board order with the distinctive title and duration present and the moved scene at its new position, and the stated Total duration equals the live sum; Copy on the outline shows a confirmation.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: seeded_board_eight_imaged_scenes
criteria.description: On first load, Tile mode shows at least 8 seeded imaged scenes, each numbered with a thumbnail and an editable description, and later scenes carry sequential getting-started copy (header tools, view modes, three-dot menu, Add Scene)
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: created_scene_visible_on_board
criteria.description: After creating a scene titled 'Harbor Opening' with valid Scene field-contract fields (title, body, duration, shotType), the text 'Harbor Opening' is visible on the board with matching duration and shot-type badge
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: three_creates_add_exactly_three
criteria.description: After adding 3 new scenes on top of the seed set, the board shows exactly 3 more scenes than the initial seeded count
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: slide_mode_single_centered_scene
criteria.description: After switching to Slide (Tutorial) mode, a single centered active scene is visible with navigation affordances
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: edited_text_replaces_previous
criteria.description: After editing a scene description/title to 'Evening Cutaway', the text 'Evening Cutaway' is visible and the previous text is not
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: deleted_scene_removed_from_board
criteria.description: After deleting a scene, that scene's title/description is no longer visible on the board
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: empty_board_state_offers_add
criteria.description: After deleting every scene, a visible empty-board state explains that the board is empty and offers a way to add a scene
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: empty_submit_blocked_with_validation
criteria.description: After submitting the create form with an empty required title or body, the visible scene count is unchanged and an inline validation message naming the empty field is shown
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: view_mode_switch_relayouts_without_reload
criteria.description: After switching among Tile, List, and Slide view modes, the same scene set re-lays out without a full page navigation or document reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: scene_one_welcome_line_and_doc_title
criteria.description: Scene 1's description opens with the line 'Welcome to Docs!' and the document title is '1. Getting Started — Docs'
criteria.reasoning: Fixed missing ARIA / alt text and observed correctly populated DOM.

criteria.name: back_to_top_appears_after_scroll
criteria.description: After scrolling the board down past roughly 400px a back-to-top control appears; clicking it returns the board to the top and the control hides
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: crud_updates_derived_counts
criteria.description: The scenes collection supports create, edit, and delete from the UI, with scene numbering and the Slide N / total counter updating from the same shared collection
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: view_mode_and_slide_state_shared
criteria.description: View mode and slide index behave as shared client state: switching modes re-lays out the same scene set without a document reload, and the Slide counter total always matches the number of scenes currently on the board
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: slide_controls_keys_counter_bounds
criteria.description: Slide mode shows a single centered active scene with a previous/next control pair and an N / total counter; the Left/Right arrow keys and the controls advance the scene, and the controls are disabled at the first and last scene
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: placeholder_scenes_and_add_scene_control
criteria.description: The board ends with at least 2 empty camera placeholder scenes (each showing a centered add-image affordance) followed by an Add Scene control pairing a primary button with a dropdown chevron
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: inert_header_controls_toast_demo_only
criteria.description: Clicking an inert header control (kebab menu, notifications bell, dashboard, or account) raises a demo-only toast instead of navigating to another view or origin
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: edit_flow_cross_mode_chain
criteria.description: Starting in Tile mode, edit a scene's description to 'Cutaway to the harbor at dusk.'; then switch to List mode and Slide mode: the same numbered scene shows the updated text in both modes without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: create_flow_cross_mode_chain
criteria.description: Starting in Tile mode, count the visible scenes; create a scene via Add Scene with title 'Dawn Chase' and a valid description; the count increases by exactly one and the new scene appears numbered at the end of the grid; then switch to List mode ('Dawn Chase' is present) and to Slide mode (the N / total counter total increased by one) — all without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: delete_flow_renumber_chain
criteria.description: Delete a scene from the middle of the board: its card is removed, the remaining scenes renumber sequentially with no gaps, and in Slide mode the N / total counter total decreases by one with the previous/next controls disabling at the new first and last scene
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: slide_arrow_full_walk
criteria.description: Entering Slide mode at scene 1 and pressing the Right arrow repeatedly advances through every scene in order with the N / total counter incrementing each step; pressing Left repeatedly walks back the same sequence to scene 1
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_state
criteria.description: After creating a scene, switching to List mode, and advancing to a later slide, a page reload returns the app to its seeded state: the seeded scenes only, Tile mode active, and the first slide position — all facets reset together, never a mix of kept and reset state
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: double_submit_adds_exactly_one
criteria.description: Double-activating the create form's submit control in quick succession adds exactly one scene: the visible scene count increases by one and exactly one new card appears
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: arrow_keys_no_wrap_at_bounds
criteria.description: In Slide mode, pressing Left at the first scene and Right at the last scene leaves the centered scene and the N / total counter unchanged (no wrap-around)
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: inline_validation_before_submit_names_field
criteria.description: Typing an invalid or empty value in a create-form field (title, body, duration, or shotType) shows an inline validation message directly under that field, naming the field, before any submit occurs
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: create_submit_disabled_until_valid
criteria.description: In the Add Scene create form, the submit control is disabled while any Scene field-contract field is empty or invalid, and becomes enabled once title, body, duration, and shotType are all valid
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: scene_field_contract_on_create
criteria.description: Add Scene create form enforces the Scene field contract: title (1–80), body/Description (1–500), duration integer 1–300, and shotType one of wide/medium/close-up/insert/pov; submit stays disabled until valid, and a successful create shows matching title, body, duration, and shot-type badge on the new card
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: invalid_duration_or_shot_type_rejected
criteria.description: Entering a duration outside 1–300 or leaving shot type unset/invalid on Add Scene shows an inline validation message naming duration or shotType, adds no scene, and leaves the visible scene count unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: total_duration_live_rollup
criteria.description: The nav bar Total duration equals the sum of every scene's duration in seconds and recomputes immediately after create, edit, delete, bulk delete, or reorder
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: multi_select_bulk_delete
criteria.description: Selecting at least two scenes reveals a bulk Delete selected control; confirming it removes every selected scene, renumbers survivors with no gaps, and updates Slide total and Total duration in one step
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: undo_redo_scene_mutations
criteria.description: After create, edit, or delete, Undo restores the prior scenes collection, numbering, and Total duration and enables Redo; Redo reapplies the mutation; Undo/Redo disable at empty stacks; Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Shift+Z (or Ctrl+Y) drive the same history
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: export_center_storyboard_json_and_markdown
criteria.description: Export opens a center with live Storyboard JSON, Markdown shot list, and Printable outline previews plus Copy and Download on the active format; Storyboard JSON shows schemaVersion storyboard-tutorial-v1, title, viewMode (tile/list/slide), totalDuration, and scenes entries with id, title, body, duration, shotType, and order
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: export_contains_session_mutations
criteria.description: After creating a scene with a distinctive title and duration, editing another scene's shot type, and switching to List, reopening Export shows those values under the field-contract keys in Storyboard JSON (viewMode list, new title/duration, updated shotType, matching totalDuration) and the Markdown shot list names the same title, shot type, and duration
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: import_round_trip_reconstructs_board
criteria.description: After exporting Storyboard JSON from a mutated board, changing the board further, then Importing that JSON reconstructs scenes, view mode, and Total duration to match the export without a reload, and both Export previews match the restored state
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: scene_reorder_updates_order
criteria.description: Using Move earlier/later (or drag-reorder) on a scene changes board order, renumbers sequentially with no gaps, keeps Total duration unchanged, and makes Slide mode walk the new sequence
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: search_and_shot_type_filter
criteria.description: The nav bar exposes a search field and shot-type chips (All plus Wide, Medium, Close-up, Insert, POV): typing a query narrows visible scenes to case-insensitive title/body matches, selecting a chip narrows to that shot type, using both intersects, a filtered-count readout shows N of M scenes, Tile/List/Slide show the same filtered subset (Slide total equals the filtered count), and clearing search plus selecting All restores the full set exactly
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: bulk_duplicate_selected
criteria.description: With two or more scenes selected, Duplicate selected appends one copy per selected scene at the end of the board in board order — each copy keeping the source body, duration, and shot type with its title suffixed (copy) — renumbers sequentially, and increases Total duration by exactly the sum of the duplicated durations in one undoable step
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: presenter_mode_playback
criteria.description: Activating Present replaces the workspace with a presenter showing one scene (image, number, title, body, shot-type badge) and a countdown starting at that scene's duration in seconds; when the countdown reaches zero the presenter auto-advances and the countdown resets to the new scene's duration; a Scene N of total readout and an overall progress bar track the run; End presentation or Escape exits back to the previous view mode with the board intact
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: presenter_pause_resume_manual_advance
criteria.description: In the presenter, Pause freezes the countdown and becomes Resume, resuming continues from the remaining seconds rather than restarting the scene; Right/Left arrow keys and the visible next/previous controls advance manually with the countdown resetting to the shown scene's duration; after the last scene the presenter shows a finished state with Restart and Exit rather than wrapping
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: printable_outline_export
criteria.description: The Export center's Printable outline tab shows a print-optimized outline compiled live from the store — board title, Total duration, and one row per scene in board order with number, title, shotType label, and duration in seconds — Copy and Download work on its text, and a Print control on that tab opens the browser print preview showing the outline layout
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: spacing_matches_storyboard_scale
criteria.description: At 1440px, spacing among the product header, Tile/List/Slide nav bar, and multi-column scene grid follows a consistent scale matching the reference screenshots — no arbitrary one-off gaps that break the docs/storyboard composition.
criteria.reasoning: Observed matching functionality successfully in Playwright browser tests.

criteria.name: typography_matches_geometric_sans_spec
criteria.description: Header titles and board UI use a rounded geometric sans-serif face consistent with the reference light workspace; scene description copy follows the tutorial hierarchy — not a default system UI stack for chrome.

criteria.name: desktop_composition_matches_reference
criteria.description: At 1440px the layout matches the reference composition within a small tolerance: product header (logo, Demo Projects, 1. Getting Started, kebab, utility tools) above a Tile multi-column scene grid with trailing camera placeholders and Add Scene — a docs/storyboard workspace, not a marketing landing.

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_have_motion
criteria.description: State changes the spec calls out — scene enter on first load, Tile/List/Slide re-layout, slide advance, create/delete card motion, and demo/mode toasts — show the specified transitions rather than hard cuts (verified via real UI controls).

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_reference_patterns

criteria.name: controls_styled_not_browser_default

criteria.name: clear_hierarchy_header_vs_scenes

criteria.name: component_states_match_spec

criteria.name: yellow_accent_and_card_surfaces

criteria.name: out_of_contract_duration_rejected

criteria.name: empty_undo_redo_disabled
